# Image Credits

All character images hosted in `data/images/` are sourced from Fandom wikis and are used under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike (CC-BY-SA) license. Attribution is listed below.

Images have been resized to approximately 200px width for web optimization.

---

## Format

| File | Source URL | License | Author/Wiki |
|------|-----------|---------|-------------|
| (entries added by scraper) | | CC-BY-SA 3.0 | Fandom |

---

## License Terms

Images used under [Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 3.0 Unported (CC BY-SA 3.0)](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/).

You are free to:
- Share and adapt the material

Under the following terms:
- **Attribution**: Credit the Fandom wiki and original uploaders as listed above
- **ShareAlike**: Distribute derivatives under the same license
